programme.title: Mysteries at the Museum
programme.sub-title: Swamp People, Walkie-Talkie Heist and Grant's Writing Water
programme.desc: Don Wildman examines an enigmatic canoe that unlocked the origins of a lost civilization, a miracle drug used by a Civil War hero in his last battle, and a bust involved in a supernatural game of chess.

programme.title: Mysteries at the Museum
programme.sub-title: Evel Spirit, Dawn of the Diaper and Cliff Palace
programme.desc: Don Wildman examines a hot-air balloon used in the first Atlantic crossing by balloon, a ceramic jar used to hold a creepy medical cure and a mission patch tied to a space travel first.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Mysteries at the Museum
programme.sub-title: The First Super Computer, Flying Under Fire and Dighton Rock
programme.desc: Don Wildman examines a boulder covered in strange carvings, which could turn American history on its head; a sword belonging to an explorer accused of treason; and the marble bust of a great leader who tried to untangle an ancient puzzle.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Mysteries at the Museum
programme.sub-title: King Neptune, Friday Night Bank Robber and Karluk's Last Voyage
programme.desc: Don Wildman examines a patriotic pig that helped fund World War II, a man's trek to rescue his crew during a brutal Arctic expedition, and two activists who risked their lives to take down a superpower and save the whales.

programme.title: Mysteries at the Museum
programme.sub-title: Jap Herron, Hidden Rockwell and Ticket to Fly
programme.desc: Don Wildman examines a novel supposedly written by the ghost of a legendary author, a painting that isn't quite what it seems and a replica of the plane that flew in the first commercial airline flight.

programme.title: Mysteries at the Museum
programme.sub-title: Operation Mincemeat, Texas Prison Rodeo and Tully Monster
programme.desc: Don Wildman examines an enigmatic oar used in an unreal World War II deception, a gold nugget that helped set off the gold rush and a fossil belonging to one of history's strangest creatures.

programme.title: Mysteries at the Museum
programme.sub-title: Reckless, Thousand Island Dressing and the Tornado
programme.desc: Don Wildman examines a hero horse who risked her life, a culinary mystery about a popular salad dressing and an Olympic runner's battle with polio.

programme.sub-title: The Dawn of Cinema, Megalonyx and The First Skyscraper

programme.sub-title: Pretty Boy Floyd, Chupacabra and The Hollow Earth Theory

programme.title: 1776 - 2026 250th Anniversary Quarter Celebration Program
programme.desc: 2026 will be one of the most historic years ever in U.S. coinage; join your host Mike Mezack to learn about the incredible U.S. Quarter program and get a chance at an exclusive P&D Roll!

programme.title: Kindred Spirits
programme.sub-title: The Legacy of Lizzie Borden
programme.desc: Adam and Amy investigate one of the most infamous places in America, the Lizzie Borden House; one of the tour guides experiences terrifying paranormal activity and fears for her life, and Adam and Amy discover there's a life hanging in the balance.

programme.title: The Haunted Museum
programme.sub-title: The Evil Puppet Twins
programme.desc: After his ailing grandfather dies, teenager Arthur discovers two vintage puppets in his attic; once released, the puppets begin to haunt the house with evil intent, looking for a new victim to control.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Haunted Museum
programme.sub-title: Halloween Ritual Coffin
programme.desc: A teenager steals a prop coffin on Halloween night, unaware that it's cursed with an ancient evil that latches onto him each Halloween after that.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Haunted Museum
programme.sub-title: The Stone Face
programme.desc: While working at a wealthy art collector's mansion, a young man finds an ancient stone carving with supernatural powers that suck him into a hellish, hallucinatory nightmare.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Haunted Museum
programme.sub-title: Satanic Six String
programme.desc: A troubled teenager stumbles across an old guitar while exploring an abandoned farmhouse; when he plays it, he begins having nightmarish visions of a serial killer who is dead set on continuing his murderous rampage from beyond the grave.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Haunted Museum
programme.sub-title: The Cursed Brothel Bed
programme.desc: In desperate need of money to pay for her son's medical treatment, a single mother becomes a sex worker at a legal brothel; when a murderous ghost begins stalking her, she must unravel the mystery before she becomes the entity's next victim.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Haunted Museum
programme.sub-title: The Devil's Cauldron
programme.desc: After purchasing Ed Gein's cauldron at a Gein estate sale in 1958, Evelyn Mair's family had many negative experiences with the cursed item, forcing them to get rid of it.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Haunted Hospitals
programme.sub-title: Terror in the Sanitorium, The Break Room, Do Not Enter
programme.desc: A medical assistant starting a job in a former TB hospital discovers she's not alone in the building; a rookie nurse takes her break in a room rumored to be haunted; a procedural nurse enconters a hostile entity within the walls of an old hospital.

programme.title: Haunted Hospitals
programme.sub-title: The Gift, Room 19, The Cooler
programme.desc: An orderly discovers his frightening gift for seeing spirits of the recently deceased and sensing those who are about to die; a hospice nurse realizes the end-of-life facility where she works is haunted by multiple spirits, including a black dog.

programme.title: Haunted Hospitals
programme.sub-title: The Malevolent Boy, Cat
programme.desc: A nurse in Texas discovers her hospital is haunted by a mischievous boy whose pranks becomes increasingly malicious; a cook at a county hospital witnesses paranormal events in connection with the long-time janitor.

programme.title: Haunted Hospitals
programme.sub-title: Creature, The Vigil, The Exorcist
programme.desc: A nurse aide discovers that her care facility contains a horrific creature that threatens her elderly patients; encounters in the hospital halls with a nefarious crone compels a teenager to hold vigil by her dying grandmother's bedside.

programme.title: Haunted Hospitals
programme.sub-title: Connection, Ghost Interrupted, Terror in the Tunnel
programme.desc: A nurse assistant observes uncanny coincidences that emerge in connection with a long term care resident. A teenager at a psychiatric facility detects spirits in an abandoned building. While transporting a baby a nurse senses a disturbing presence.

programme.title: Haunted Hospitals
programme.sub-title: What Comes Around, This Is Where It Feeds, The Boy With the Ball
programme.desc: A personal support worker encounters spirits that emerge from her patients; a housekeeper at an assisted care home is terrified by an entity that taunts her while she works.

programme.title: Haunted Hospitals
programme.sub-title: Good Vs. Evil, The Haunting
programme.desc: A young nurse's time at a Catholic hospital is marked by dual entities: one seems to be a force for good, while the other is a malevolent presence; a homecare nurse tends to a terminally ill veteran haunted by the ghosts of his past.

programme.title: Haunted Hospitals
programme.sub-title: Southern Gothic, Spiritual Treatment
programme.desc: A nurse aide experiences frightening paranormal events in a large nursing home; a psychiatric technician is intrigued by his ability to communicate with the ghosts in the facility.

programme.title: Haunted Hospitals
programme.sub-title: The Labyrinth, Spirits in a Material World, Bed 23
programme.desc: An IT technician embarks on an intensive job trial at a large hospital and encounters multiple paranormal phenomena within its labyrinthine halls; a psychiatric nurse experiences frightening otherworldly encounters.

programme.title: Haunted Hospitals
programme.sub-title: Her Last Breath, The Graveyard Shift, The Apparition
programme.desc: A nurse aide is shocked to find that the aggrieved spirit of a palliative patient still inhabits her room; a young nurse assigned to an overnight shift in the cardiac unit is terrified by the realization that it is haunted.

programme.title: Haunted Hospitals
programme.sub-title: Good Vs. Evil, The Haunting
programme.desc: A young nurse's time at a Catholic hospital is marked by dual entities: one seems to be a force for good, while the other is a malevolent presence; a homecare nurse tends to a terminally ill veteran haunted by the ghosts of his past.
